variants.label: Arch (ALHP) — KDE Plasma
variants.description: Vanilla Arch packages built x86-64-v3-optimized via ALHP. Mainline linux 7.x, DKMS-built nvidia-open + r8125 + broadcom modules. Full Plasma 6 desktop with curated daily-driver app set. No CachyOS dependency — recommended default.

variants.label: Arch (ALHP) — Headless server / container host
variants.description: Same kernel + drivers as arch-kde, no desktop. Containers (podman, docker, distrobox, incus), libvirt+qemu, cockpit web admin.

variants.label: CachyOS-based — KDE Plasma
variants.description: CachyOS bore-lto 7.x kernel with pre-built nvidia/zfs/r8125 modules. Full Plasma 6 desktop with curated daily-driver app set. CachyOS performance tunings + repo packages.

variants.label: CachyOS-based — Headless server / container host
variants.description: Same kernel + drivers as cachy-kde, no desktop. Containers (podman, docker, distrobox, incus), libvirt+qemu, cockpit web admin.
